title: What's the one mod you'd undo?
description: If you could take back one modification you've done to your car, what would it be and why? Sometimes the best lessons come from the mods that didn't work out.

title: Show us your engine bay!
description: Clean or dirty, stock or built -- post a photo of what's under the hood. Bonus props for the cleanest engine bays.

title: What's your daily driver vs. your show car?
description: Some of us have both. Show us what you drive to work and what comes out on weekends.

title: Best mod under $500?
description: What's the single best bang-for-the-buck modification you've done? Help the community find affordable wins.

title: Throwback time! First car vs. current car.
description: Post a photo of your first car next to your current build. Show us how far you've come.

title: What's your dream build?
description: Unlimited budget, no rules. What car would you build and what would you do to it? Dream big.

title: Favorite exhaust note?
description: Upload a sound clip or just tell us -- what's the best exhaust sound you've ever heard? V8 rumble? Turbo flutter? Flat-six scream?

title: Car show ready? Show your detail game.
description: Post your best detail job. Paint correction, ceramic coat, fresh wax -- let's see that shine.

title: What are you working on this weekend?
description: Installing parts? Going to a meet? Just cruising? Share your weekend plans with The Scene.

title: Interior shots only!
description: Show us the inside. Custom steering wheel? Aftermarket seats? Roll cage? Clean stock interior? Let's see it.

title: What car turned you into an enthusiast?
description: Every car person has that one car that started it all. What was yours? Share the story.

title: Wheel Wednesday!
description: Show off your wheel setup. Brand, size, offset, tire specs. The community wants to know.

title: What's the most underrated car platform?
description: What car doesn't get enough love? Make your case for the most slept-on platform in the game.

title: Night photo challenge!
description: Post your best night photo. Parking garages, city lights, neon signs -- dark backgrounds make cars pop.

title: Before and after: biggest transformation
description: Post a before and after of your build. The bigger the change, the better. Show the journey.

title: What's your next mod?
description: What's next on the list? Saving up for something big? Planning a small upgrade? Share your plans.

title: Favorite driving road near you?
description: Every car person has a favorite road. Where's yours? Mountain twisties? Highway pulls? Back roads?

title: Show your garage / workspace!
description: Not your car garage on The Scene -- your actual garage. Where the work happens. Tools, lifts, and all.

title: What's your car's name?
description: Does your car have a name? Most of us name our builds. What's yours and how did you pick it?

title: Dyno day! Post your numbers.
description: If you've hit the dyno, share your sheet. WHP, WTQ, tuner, fuel type. The community loves numbers.
